name: AI Platform Technical Due Diligence
description: Performs independent, skeptical, engineering-grade technical due diligence reviews of AI platforms, autonomous agent systems, and Odoo-related architectures. Evaluates architecture soundness, AI design, Odoo expertise, scalability, security, production readiness, and commercial viability.

capabilities.name: Architecture Review
capabilities.description: Evaluate separation of concerns, component independence, over-engineering, under-engineering, and architectural debt across platform layers.

capabilities.name: AI Design Review
capabilities.description: Distinguish real AI/ML systems from keyword matchers and template lookups. Evaluate reasoning, planning, memory, self-correction, and multi-agent coordination.

capabilities.name: Odoo Implementation Review
capabilities.description: Assess whether a platform can actually implement, maintain, migrate, and operate Odoo Enterprise, Community, OCA, and custom modules.

capabilities.name: Scalability Review
capabilities.description: Identify bottlenecks under enterprise-scale assumptions: thousands of modules, hundreds of databases, billions of rows, distributed teams, multi-cloud.

capabilities.name: Security Review
capabilities.description: Evaluate prompt injection, tool abuse, MCP security, secrets management, credential handling, supply chain, plugin, and autonomous execution risks.

capabilities.name: Production Readiness Assessment
capabilities.description: Check observability, tracing, audit logs, rollback, versioning, disaster recovery, HA, backups, multi-tenancy, rate limiting, approvals, policy, and compliance.

capabilities.name: Competitive Analysis
capabilities.description: Compare platform capabilities against GitHub Copilot, Cursor, Claude Code, OpenHands, Devin, Odoo Studio, Odoo Upgrade Service, and similar tools.

capabilities.name: Technical Debt Assessment
capabilities.description: Estimate architecture debt, maintenance cost, learning curve, operational cost, complexity, documentation burden, testing burden, and future scalability.

capabilities.name: Commercial Evaluation
capabilities.description: Assess market fit, differentiation, competitive advantage, business value, risk level, time to production, team size, and development time.

limitations: Requires access to source code, architecture docs, and test results for accurate review
Scores are qualitative and should be calibrated against investor/enterprise criteria
Does not perform automated penetration testing or performance benchmarking

task.description: Review objective (e.g., full due diligence, AI architecture only, security only)

competitors.description: List of competitors to compare against

metadata.author: Odoo AI Knowledge Factory
metadata.changelog: v19.0.1 — Initial technical due diligence skill derived from OAIOS platform review
